title: finance.py: ROI/NPV/IRR and saldering scenario calculations
acceptance_criteria: npf.irr and npf.npv used for IRR/NPV calculations; handles npf.irr returning nan (no real solution) gracefully
Payback period calculation from cashflow series
Dynamic-via-sensor scenario reads price from a user-supplied sensor entity_id (out-of-scope Tibber/EnergyZero integration itself)
Multi-scenario comparison output structure defined for downstream sensor/coordinator consumption
Fully type-hinted, pure functions, ruff + mypy clean
